{{Missing Info|specifics=List of files or icons that are missing from the wiki. Feel free to add any you notice are missing.}}

List of files or icons that are missing from the wiki. Feel free to add any you notice are missing.

= DONE =
Finished Icons can be seen on the following pages:

[[:Category:Icons]]
* [[Icons]]
* [[Icons/Food]]
* [[Icons/Journey to the West]]
* [[Icons/Species Map]]
* [[Icons/Time Beacon]]
* [[Icons/Wonder Fungus]]

= [[Events]] =
== [[Golden Week]] ==
* {{RewardIconWithText|Happy Coin}} (Get better version that's not cut off)
* {{RewardIconWithText|Lightning Serum}}

= Fragments =
* {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Minion Skin Fragment|orange}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|Green Fragment|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Fragment|blue}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|Green Relic Fragment|green}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|Green Relic Fragment Big|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Relic Fragment Big|purple}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Relic Fragment Big|orange}}

= [[Gene Simulation]] =
If any of these are the same image as existing Gene Segments ([[Icons/Gene Simulation]]), then please just create a redirect file instead of uploading the image again.
The most common images are the following three, but other duplicates do exist:
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|DNA}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Original}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Purple DNA}}

'''Missing Gene Segment Files'''
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Ultimate Lifeform}}

= [[Club]] =

=== Hormones ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Alpha Hormones}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Beta Hormones}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Gamma Hormones}}

=== Remains ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Alpha Remains}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Beta Remains}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Gamma Remains}}

= [[Journey to the West]] =
== Mantras ==
=== Monke ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Mountain Mover}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it
* {{RewardIconWithText|Sea Breaker}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it

=== Pigsy ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Heavenly Tactics}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it
* {{RewardIconWithText|Juicy Peach}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it

=== Sandy ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Crescent Spade (Mantra)}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it
* {{RewardIconWithText|Arhat Seal}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it

=== Sanzang ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Prajna Mantra}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it
* {{RewardIconWithText|Rebirth Mantra}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it

== Sutras ==
=== Monke ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Stone Monkey}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it

=== Sandy ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Crystal Bowl}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it

=== Sanzang ===
* {{RewardIconWithText|Heart Sutra}} - Get image that doesn't have numbers in it

= [[Minigames]] =
* {{RewardIconWithText|Minion Chore Game}}

= [[Salesman]] =
Items the [[Salesman]] can sell
* {{RewardIconWithText|Johns Baby Powder}}

= [[Shells]] =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Rendlem Forest Light}}

= [[Wormhole]] and [[Rocket]] Parts =
Please either upload these with tier designations (T1, T2, T3, T4, T5) or color designations (White, Green, Blue, Purple, Orange). I can make either work with [[Template:GetColorImage]].

'''Earth's Rebels'''
* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Rebel Deck Plate}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Rebel Deck Plate}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Deck Plate}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Rebel Deck Plate}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Rebel Deck Plate}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Rebel Lens}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Rebel Lens}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Lens}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Rebel Lens}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Rebel Lens}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Rebel Radio}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Rebel Radio}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Radio}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Rebel Radio}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Rebel Radio}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Rebel Polyester}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Rebel Polyester}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Polyester}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Rebel Polyester}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Rebel Polyester}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Rebel Nano Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Rebel Nano Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Rebel Nano Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Rebel Nano Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Rebel Nano Chip}}


'''Demon Gods'''
* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Demon God Bearing}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Demon God Bearing}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Bearing}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Demon God Bearing}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Demon God Bearing}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Demon God Gear}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Demon God Gear}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Gear}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Demon God Gear}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Demon God Gear}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Demon God Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Demon God Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Demon God Chip}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Demon God Chip}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Demon God Prism}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Demon God Prism}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Prism}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Demon God Prism}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Demon God Prism}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Demon God Engine}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Demon God Engine}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Demon God Engine}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Demon God Engine}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Demon God Engine}}


'''Earth's Will'''
* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave E}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave E}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave E}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave E}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave E}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave A}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave A}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave A}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave A}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave A}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave R}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave R}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave R}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave R}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave R}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave T}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave T}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave T}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave T}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave T}}


* {{RewardIconWithText|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave H}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave H}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave H}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave H}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave H}}

[[Category:Editor]]
[[Category:Icons]]
